    A

    addAt(int, Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Insert a Song at a specific index.
    addFirst(Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Add a song at the front of the list.
    addFirst(Song) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Add a song to the begining of the PlayListDL.
    addLast(Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Add a song at the end of the list.
    addLast(Song) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Add a song to the end of the PlayListDL.
    audioControls() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the audio controls submenu.
    AudioPlayer - Class in Unnamed Package
    AudioPlayer is a helper class that uses Java’s built-in javax.sound.sampled API to load, play, pause, resume, stop, and adjust volume for audio clips (WAV/AIFF).
    AudioPlayer() - Constructor for class AudioPlayer
     

    C

    clear() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Remove all nodes (constant-time reset of the list).
    close() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Closes the audio clip and releases system resources.
    contains(Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
     

    D

    displayBackward() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Print the list from tail → head with indices and basic song info.
    displayCurrentSongInfo() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Displays information about the currently loaded song.
    displayForward() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Print the list from head → tail with indices and basic song info.
    displayPlayListDL() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Display all songs in the PlayListDL to the console.
    DoublyLinkedSongList - Class in Unnamed Package
    DoublyLinkedSongList My doubly-linked list specialized for Song objects.
    DoublyLinkedSongList() - Constructor for class DoublyLinkedSongList
     
    DoublyLinkedSongListOperation() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the low-level DoublyLinkedSongList operations submenu.
    DoublyLinkedSongNode - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a single node in the SongLinkedList.
    DoublyLinkedSongNode(Song) - Constructor for class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Constructor: creates a node with a song and no next link.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class Song
    Two songs are considered equal if they have the same title and artist.

    F

    fileOperations() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the file operations submenu.
    FileUtils - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility helpers for reading/writing playlists to CSV and for validating referenced audio files on disk.
    FileUtils() - Constructor for class FileUtils
     
    findSongByTitle(String) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Find a song by its title.
    findSongsByArtist(String) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Find all songs by a given artist.

    G

    get(int) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Returns the Song at index (0-based).
    getAbsoluteFilePath() - Method in class Song
    Get absolute file path
    getArtist() - Method in class Song
    Get song artist
    getCurrentIndex() - Method in class PlayListDL
     
    getCurrentSong() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Return the current song, or null if none is set.
    getDuration() - Method in class Song
    Get song duration (in seconds)
    getHeadNode() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
     
    getNext() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Get the next node in the list
    getPlayListDL() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Return the underlying DoublyLinkedSongList.
    getPlayListDLStatistics() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Print basic statistics: total number of songs and total duration.
    getPrev() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
     
    getSong() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Get the song stored in this node
    getTailNode() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
     
    getTitle() - Method in class Song
    Get song title
    getTotalDuration() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Compute the total duration of the PlayListDL.

    H

    hasNext() - Method in class PlayListDL
     
    hasPrevious() - Method in class PlayListDL
     
    hasSongs() - Method in class PlayListDL
    Check if the PlayListDL contains any songs.

    I

    indexOf(Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Find the first index of a Song by equality.
    intValidation() - Static method in class Main
    Reads an integer from the shared Scanner, reprompting until valid.
    isEmpty() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
     
    isPlaying() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Checks if audio is currently playing.

    J

    jumpToSong(int, AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Set the "current" song by index.

    L

    loadMultipleCSVsAndCombine(DoublyLinkedSongList, Scanner) - Static method in class FileUtils
    Read multiple CSV paths (typed by user) and append all found songs into the provided linked list.
    loadPlayListDLFromCSV(String) - Static method in class FileUtils
    Load a playlist from a CSV file into a new DoublyLinkedSongList.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
    Entry point of the program.
    Main - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main class provides the menu-driven interface for managing songs, playlists, and controlling audio playback.
    Main() - Constructor for class Main
     
    MusicPlayerGUI - Class in Unnamed Package
    MusicPlayerGUI Minimal Swing GUI I built for the C-level requirements.
    MusicPlayerGUI() - Constructor for class MusicPlayerGUI
    Constructor: sets up the window, wires the UI, and initializes control states.

    N

    nextSong(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Advance to the next song (if any) and start playback.
    nodeAt(int) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Return the internal node at index.

    P

    parseDurationToSeconds(String) - Static method in class FileUtils
    Parse "mm:ss" into total seconds.
    parseFlexibleDuration(String) - Static method in class Main
    Parses a duration entered as "mm:ss" or plain seconds.
    pauseAudio() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Pauses playback and remembers the position so it can be resumed later.
    playAudio(Song) - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Loads and plays the given song from the beginning, or resumes from the last paused position if already loaded.
    playCurrentSong(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Play the current song.
    playFromStart(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Start playback from the first song in the PlayListDL, moving through each song sequentially.
    playListBasics() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the playlist wrapper (high-level) operations submenu.
    PlayListDL - Class in Unnamed Package
    The PlayListDL class manages a collection of songs stored in a DoublyLinkedSongList.
    PlayListDL(DoublyLinkedSongList) - Constructor for class PlayListDL
    Construct a new PlayListDL backed by the given DoublyLinkedSongList.
    playRandom(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Play a random song from the PlayListDL.
    previousSong(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
     
    printMenu() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the top-level menu options.
    promptSong() - Static method in class Main
    Prompts the user for Song fields and constructs a Song.

    R

    removeAt(int) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Remove and return the Song at a specific index.
    removeFirst() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Remove and return the first song.
    removeLast() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
    Remove and return the last song.
    resumeAudio() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Resumes playback from the last paused position.

    S

    saveAndExport() - Static method in class Main
    Prints the save/export submenu.
    savePlaylistToCSV(String, DoublyLinkedSongList) - Static method in class FileUtils
    Save all songs from a linked list to a CSV file (overwrites if exists).
    setAbsoluteFilePath(String) - Method in class Song
    Set absolute file path for the audio file
    setArtist(String) - Method in class Song
    Set song artist
    setDuration(int) - Method in class Song
    Set song duration in seconds
    setNext(DoublyLinkedSongNode) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Set or update the reference to the next node
    setPlaylistData(DoublyLinkedSongList) - Method in class MusicPlayerGUI
    Loads the JList from a provided DoublyLinkedSongList (dll).
    setPrev(DoublyLinkedSongNode) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
     
    setSong(Song) - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Set or update the song stored in this node
    setTitle(String) - Method in class Song
    Set song title
    setVolumePercent(int) - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Sets playback volume based on a percentage (0–100).
    size() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongList
     
    Song - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a single song with metadata and file path.
    Song(String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Song
    Constructor to create a Song object with all details.
    stopAudio() - Method in class AudioPlayer
    Stops playback and resets position back to the start of the song.
    stopPlayback(AudioPlayer) - Method in class PlayListDL
    Stop audio playback using the given AudioPlayer.
    stringValidation() - Static method in class Main
    Reads a full line of text from the shared Scanner, reprompting if needed.

    T

    toString() - Method in class DoublyLinkedSongNode
    Return the string representation of the song in this node
    toString() - Method in class Song
    Return a human-readable string with all song details.

    U

    updateNowPlayingLabel(Song) - Method in class MusicPlayerGUI
    Small helper that sets the text for the "Now Playing" label.

    V

    validateAudioFiles(DoublyLinkedSongList) - Static method in class FileUtils
    Checks that every song’s absolute file path points to a real file.
